links.title: Delete Monitor - Parallel
links.description: Delete a monitor. Deletes a monitor, stopping all future executions. Deleted monitors can no longer be updated or retrieved.

links.title: Task Group - Parallel
links.description: Batch process Tasks at scale with the Parallel Task Group API

links.title: Retrieve Task Group - Parallel
links.description: Retrieves aggregated status across runs in a TaskGroup.

links.title: Stream Task Run Events - Parallel
links.description: Streams events for a task run. Returns a stream of events showing progress updates and state changes for the task run. For task runs that did not have enable...

links.description: Webhook events for task run completions

links.description: Use Parallel Search as a tool with OpenAI's function calling to give GPT models real-time web access
